side_stories.title: The Wandering Felyne
unlock_conditions: Speak to Felyne merchant in Azuria Village
Have 5+ different monster species in party

quest_chain.objective: Find the wandering Felyne in Azuria Plains
Escort Felyne to hidden gathering spot

side_stories.story_summary: A lost Felyne merchant seeks help returning to his secret gathering grounds. In exchange, he offers to join your adventure as a permanent companion.

rewards.companion: Felyne - provides gathering bonuses and item hints

side_stories.efficiency_notes: Essential early-game companion. Gathering bonuses pay for themselves quickly.
tips: Start this as soon as Chapter 3 is available
Felyne gathering spots contain rare materials not found elsewhere
Companion abilities stack with your own gathering skills
Felyne provides hints about nearby rare materials

side_stories.title: Legend of the Silver Rathalos
unlock_conditions: Defeat 10 Flying Wyverns in head-to-head combat

quest_chain.objective: Track Silver Rathalos through aerial zones
Defeat Guardian Rathalos protecting Silver's territory
Prove worthiness in aerial combat trial

quest_chain.requirements: All previous fragments + Rathalos at max bond

side_stories.story_summary: Legends speak of a Silver Rathalos whose speed surpasses all others. Only those who prove themselves worthy of the skies may earn its respect and partnership.
side_stories.efficiency_notes: Long questline but Silver Rathalos is top-tier reward. Worth the investment for speed-focused teams.
tips: Requires significant preparation - don't attempt undergeared
Master aerial combat before starting final challenges
Silver Rathalos has unique attack patterns - study them
Keep multiple flying monsters for different trial requirements
Stock up on healing items - trials are marathon endurance tests

side_stories.title: The Ancient Trial

quest_chain.objective: Defeat 3 Elder Dragons in succession without rest
Complete time attack against ultimate opponents
quest_chain.requirements: Sub-5 minute clear times on designated monsters
Max bond with entire active team

quest_chain.objective: Solve ancient puzzles using monster knowledge
Face the ultimate fear - corrupted Fatalis
Surpass the limits of hunter and monster

side_stories.story_summary: The ultimate test left by ancient monster riders. Seven trials that push hunter and monster beyond their limits to achieve perfect synchronization and mastery.

rewards.talisman: Ancient Talisman - unlocks hidden game content
abilities: Ancient Knowledge - see all monster weaknesses

side_stories.efficiency_notes: Massive time investment but unlocks ultimate endgame content. Only for completion perfectionists.
tips: Only attempt after mastering all other content
Each trial requires different optimization - adapt team accordingly
Save frequently - trials can be restarted but progress is valuable
Study ancient lore hints - trials contain puzzle elements
Final trial is deliberately enigmatic - experimentation required

side_stories.title: Deviljho's Hunger

quest_chain.objective: Restore balance to regions after Deviljho invasions
Confront and defeat Deviljho in direct combat
quest_chain.requirements: S-tier combat team with crowd control

side_stories.story_summary: The dreaded Deviljho's hunger drives it to invade territories and disrupt ecosystems. Understanding its nature may lead to an unlikely partnership.

rewards.monster: Deviljho - A-tier Power specialist with unique hunger mechanics
rewards.knowledge: Understanding of invader monster behavior patterns
rewards.special: Deviljho's hunger can be channeled for massive damage bursts

side_stories.efficiency_notes: Deviljho is powerful but difficult to manage. Niche appeal for experienced hunters.
tips: Deviljho requires constant feeding or becomes uncontrollable
Hunger mechanics add complexity but enable devastating attacks
Best used as specialist monster for tough encounters
Keep plenty of raw meat for feeding requirements
Deviljho's presence affects other monsters' behavior

side_missions.title: Habitat Restoration: Rathian Nest
unlock_conditions: Access to Azuria Plains fully unlocked

objectives.progress_tracking: Population targets: Herbivores 15+, Small predators 8-10, Large predators 3-5

objectives.task: Plant native vegetation and manage food sources
objectives.progress_tracking: Plant 50 native species, establish 10 food sources

objectives.task: Introduce healthy Rathian pair to restored habitat
objectives.requirements: Captured male and female Rathian of good health
objectives.progress_tracking: Monitor for 72 in-game hours for successful adaptation

objectives.requirements: All previous phases completed + time for ecosystem maturation
objectives.progress_tracking: S-rank certification from Ecological Survey team

optimal_order: Complete full area survey first - reveals all needed resources
Focus on population balance during normal hunting activities
Gather planting materials during exploration phases
Time apex introduction with natural breeding season
Allow 1-2 weeks real-time for ecosystem to stabilize
time_savers: Combine resource gathering with other quests in the area
Use Felyne companion for efficient seed/material detection
Plan monster relocations during story missions requiring those areas
Stock up on ecosystem materials early - many are time-gated

ongoing: Access to S-rank Rathian breeding pairs
rewards.ultimate: Dreadqueen Rathian mutation becomes available with 3 Poison monsters in habitat

side_missions.efficiency_notes: Essential for accessing Dreadqueen Rathian - the best Fire/Poison specialist in the game. High impact mission.
tips: Start early - ecosystem restoration takes real-world time to complete
Document everything during survey phase - saves backtracking later
Population targets are strict - monitor carefully during rebalancing
Native seeds are region-specific - can't substitute from other areas
S-rank certification unlocks mutation prerequisites

side_missions.title: Thunder Lord Challenge
unlock_conditions: Astalos habitat restored to A-rank minimum
Defeat 5 Thunder-element monsters in head-to-head combat

challenge_series.objective: Defeat 10 consecutive Thunder monsters without taking damage
Win 15 head-to-head Technical exchanges in a row
Achieve perfect kinship sync with trial Astalos
challenge_series.mechanics: Must match Astalos movements and attacks in harmony

challenge_series.objective: Prove worthiness to the Thunder Lord
challenge_series.requirements: All previous trials passed + S-tier team
challenge_series.special_conditions: Must win without using items or environmental assistance

preparation: Master head-to-head timing on easier Technical monsters first
Practice dodge timing extensively - Lightning Reflexes trial is brutal
Build a specialized anti-Thunder team with Ice/Ground elements
Stock up on paralysis resistance items and healing supplies
Study Astalos attack patterns until they're automatic responses
trial_tactics: Lightning Reflexes: Focus on perfect positioning over damage dealing
Technical Mastery: Learn the visual/audio cues for technical attacks
Thunder Lord Gauntlet: Pace yourself - it's endurance, not speed
Synchronization: Watch Boltreaver's movements, mirror them exactly
Final Judgment: Pure skill test - no shortcuts or cheese strategies

rewards.monster: Boltreaver Astalos - S-tier Technical specialist with self-buffing
abilities: Thunder Lord's Blessing - 25% Thunder damage boost

side_missions.efficiency_notes: Boltreaver Astalos is essential for meta team compositions. Difficult but necessary for end-game viability.
tips: Don't attempt until you can consistently perfect Technical head-to-heads
Lightning Reflexes trial has the highest failure rate - practice extensively
Gauntlet trial is about endurance management - pace yourself
Synchronization requires rhythm - some hunters find music helps
Final boss is pure skill check - can't be overpowered or cheesed
Take breaks between attempts - frustration leads to more failures

side_missions.title: Elder Dragon Research Initiative

objectives: Document 5 different Elder Dragon encounters
Collect biological samples from each species
Record behavioral patterns and attack sequences
Map Elder Dragon territorial boundaries
Defeat each documented Elder Dragon type
Test weaknesses and resistances experimentally
Document phase transition triggers
Analyze kinship compatibility factors
Study Elder Dragon effects on local ecosystems
Document environmental changes post-encounter
Analyze food chain disruptions and adaptations
Research restoration techniques for damaged areas
Develop unified Elder Dragon behavior theory
Propose advanced counter-strategies
Design improved detection and warning systems
Create training protocols for future hunters
Test new strategies against live Elder Dragons
Validate theoretical models in real combat
Refine techniques based on field results
Train other hunters using developed protocols

planning: Schedule around Elder Dragon spawn cycles for efficiency
Combine data collection with regular hunting activities
Use multiple save files to test different approaches safely
Coordinate with other hunters for collaborative data gathering
Document everything - research builds on itself
execution: Data collection requires patience - don't rush observations
Combat analysis benefits from multiple attempts with different loadouts
Ecosystem studies need time passage - plan other activities during waiting
Theory phase rewards careful analysis over quick completion
Practical application validates all previous work - take seriously

side_missions.efficiency_notes: Massive knowledge gain and unlocks advanced content, but very time-intensive. For dedicated researchers.
tips: Approach systematically - rushing leads to incomplete data
Document everything with screenshots/notes - memory isn't reliable
Collaborate with other players when possible for diverse perspectives
Some research requires multiple Elder Dragon encounters - plan accordingly
Theory phase benefits from reviewing other hunters' strategies
Practical application should validate theories, not just show off

efficiency_guides.strategy: Complete only essential side content that directly impacts main story power level
efficiency_guides.time_estimate: 15-20 hours for essentials vs 60+ hours for completion

efficiency_guides.strategy: Prioritize side content that unlocks S-tier monsters and team synergies
efficiency_multipliers: Habitat restorations unlock multiple monsters per investment
Combat trials teach skills applicable everywhere

efficiency_guides.strategy: Complete everything for 100% game completion and ultimate rewards
systematic_approach: Phase 2: Habitat restorations and ecosystem management
Phase 3: Combat trials and skill mastery
Phase 5: Ultimate challenges and ancient trials
